title: deina polonica
intro: Deina polonica, also known as Deinandra, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is native to the western United States and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve flatulence. Deinandra has been used to treat various health issues, including indigestion, nausea, and menstrual cramps, and is believed to have anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Deina polonica include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal benefits.
